data.body: e165 plan PASS+signed after 7 rounds (--ref HEAD needed since it depends on stacked-but-unmerged bde5+ddbe). Deep design finalized: keyring_epoch=next-epoch cursor (snapshot-frozen/restored), genesis bootstrap from ddbe CREATE keys at epoch 0, multi-key-per-epoch, epoch_for_position snapshot-aware, signed KEY ops via bde5 (TOFU genesis), EVENT_TYPES+cache+fsck+_state consumer sites. Claiming e165.
